message.entry: CData must be an M-by-N matrix or M-by-N-by-3 array.
Matrix dimensions must agree, not rendering mesh
Z must not be a scalar or vector, not rendering surface
CData must be double or single unless it is used only as a texture data
CData must be double or uint8.
size(CData) must equal size(ZData) for interpolated shading
size(AlphaData) must equal size(ZData) for interpolated alpha
size(CData) must equal size(ZData) for marker flat coloring
size(CData) must equal size(ZData) or size(ZData)-1 for flat shading
size(AlphaData) must equal size(ZData) or size(ZData)-1 for flat alpha
FaceAlpha Texture is only possible if FaceColor is Texture and if size(AlphaData) equals size(CData)
FaceAlpha Texture is only possible if FaceColor is Texture and if size(AlphaData) equals size(CData)
RGB CData not yet supported in Painter''s mode
The number of dimensions for VertexNormals must be 3
size(VertexNormals) must equal size(ZData)x 3
The number of dimensions for FaceNormals must be 2
size(FaceNormals) must equal 2(m-1)(n-1) x 3
There was not enough memory for normals. Not rendering
Arguments that are not parameter-value pairs must be numeric.
X, Y, Z, and C cannot be complex.
Z must be a matrix, not a scalar or vector.
Out of memory. For more information, see memory.
Data dimensions must agree.
Incompatible properties.
When FaceColor is ''flat'', FaceAlpha must be ''flat'' or a numeric value between 0 and 1.
When FaceColor is ''interp'', FaceAlpha must be ''interp'' or a numeric value between 0 and 1.
When FaceColor is ''texturemap'', FaceAlpha must be ''texturemap'' or a numeric value between 0 and 1.
Size of VertexNormals must be equal to the size of Vertices when lighting mode used is Gouraud
VertexNormals cannot be specified as an empty array when lighting mode used is Gouraud
Size of FaceNormals must be equal to the size of Faces when lighting mode used is Flat
FaceNormals cannot be specified as an empty array when lighting mode used is Flat
